Repair heroes the elite repair service

Repair Hero Ltd is a company specialising in repair and restoration services for a wide range of hard surfaces and materials. Serving both construction and domestic clients across uk ,

How can we help?

Please provide details about the repair needed: - Type of material (e.g., granite, laminate, UPVC) - Description of the damage or issue - Size/dimensions of the area needing repair - Any colour codes or RAL numbers needed - When would you like the repair service to be completed

Our work

Our services

Countertop, repair and restoration

- Marble and granite countertop repair - Laminated countertop repair - Corian countertop repair - Artificial stone countertop repair - Resin countertop repair - High gloss and sheen matching capabilities

Surface repairs and restoration

- UPVC interior and exterior repair - IPPS panel repair - Sanitary ware and shower tray repair - Tile repair - Brickwork repair - Veneer repair - Laminated door repair - Laminated furniture repair - Curtain walling and powder coated system repairs

Kitchen restoration

- Full kitchen restoration, including cabinets, countertops, and backsplashes - Color matching and custom paint mixing to perfectly match existing finishes - Seamless integration of new and repaired components for a cohesive look

Non-toxic water-based polyurethane

Our technicians wield the mighty Selemix Aqua paint system, a non-toxic, ISO-free weapon that can blend colors with pinpoint precision. This water-based, eco-friendly formula ensures a flawless, long-lasting finish that's resistant to scuffs, scratches, and weathering.

Pricing and quoting

We offer three pricing tiers - standard technician, advanced technician, and master technician - to ensure you get the right level of expertise for your project. We also provide a £150 on-site review to assess feasibility and provide a detailed timeframe.

Repair hero Ltd a elite repair service

The battle against wear and tear is never-ending, but the Repair Heroes are always on call. Contact us today and let our superpowers restore your surfaces to their former greatness!
